actors.name: Donald Trump
actors.blurb: Donald Trump remains the central figure in the U.S. political landscape, dominating news cycles with his policies, speeches, and controversies. His administration's decisions, such as troop withdrawals from Germany, sanctions on Cuba, and the Iran conflict, have sparked significant debate. His recent rally in The Villages, Florida, and public statements on various issues continue to shape right-wing and far-right discourse globally.
